title: Launch Alpha Readiness Checklist
author: alice.chen
content:
# Launch Alpha Readiness Checklist

**Owner:** Alice Chen
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-25 09:00 AM PT
**Target Launch:** Monday 2026-04-28 09:00 AM PT

## Engineering
- [x] Gemini summarization integrated (NOVA-139)
- [x] Checkout AI core feature complete
- [ ] NOVA-142: Launch page integration for v2 API — **BLOCKED**
- [ ] NOVA-143: QA smoke test sign-off — **BLOCKED (depends on NOVA-142)**
- [ ] Deployment runbook reviewed
- [ ] Rollback plan confirmed

## Design
- [x] Launch page assets delivered (NOVA-140)
- [x] Mobile layout reviewed
- [x] Design sign-off complete
- [ ] Mobile layout bug fixes confirmed by QA

## GTM
- [x] Launch email drafted
- [ ] Pricing confirmed by legal
- [ ] Launch email scheduled
- [ ] Sales one-pager finalized

## Product
- [x] Beta feedback reviewed
- [x] Success metrics defined

## Overall Status
**NOT READY** — 2 critical engineering blockers unresolved as of Friday morning.

## Escalation Required
Engineering and Design need to align on launch page integration status before go/no-go can be confirmed.
